W

WAKE_UP - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.actions
Action sent as a broadcast intent by the Workpath service to an app with a receiver defined in the manifest when the device wakes up from sleep mode.
WebServices - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.webservices
Class for managing WebServices.
WebServices() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.webservices.WebServices
 
WebServicesAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.webservices
Class for building web service attributes.
WebServicesAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.webservices
Builder for creating an instance of WebServicesAttributes.
WindowsBuilder() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.WindowsBuilder
Default constructor to create a new Windows Builder.
WindowsSmartCardBuilder() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.access.AuthenticationAttributes.WindowsSmartCardBuilder
Default constructor to create a new Smart Card Builder.
Workpath - Class in com.hp.workpath.api
This class includes all initialization API that uses HP Workpath SDK service.
Workpath.actions - Class in com.hp.workpath.api
Actions of Workpath SDK service
Workpath.permissions - Class in com.hp.workpath.api
Permissions of Workpath SDK service
writeReport(Context, String, HIDReport, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService
Synchronously writes a report to the accessory.
